title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Hopscotch International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Hopscotch International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Hopscotch International Enterprises:
Hopscotch International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch International Enterprises!
